steps.title: Notice the contrasting behavior
steps.content: The researchers observed several female wood ducks visiting dozens of nesting sites and laying eggs for others to incubate. Subject 8J21C instead visited only a few sites and incubated her own eggs.

steps.title: Signal an alternative pattern
steps.content: A and B introduce examples of the same pattern, and C signals similarity. The sentence needs a transition showing that Subject 8J21C followed a different course from the documented pattern. The answer is D.
